release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 50. Adds local audio alarm fatigue protection with optional seeded random buzzer patterns, 50 controlled rhythm variants per alarm episode, fixed-pattern fallback, configurable mute duration from 1 to 30 minutes, and a default 30-second buzzer / 15-second pause alarm cycle. Visual alarms, WhatsApp alerts, and alarm conditions remain active while audio is muted. Also includes the clean night glucose screen, top-row time/update/Wi-Fi layout, insulin/status display refinements, caregiver WhatsApp routing, Wi-Fi profile improvements, and consolidated web UI structure.
